description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and accented with decorative railings. The roof is steeply pitched in a gable style, featuring dark gray shingles and a small dormer window above the main entrance. The facade includes symmetrical window arrangements with wooden shutters and a central entryway accessed by a set of steps. Both the upper and lower levels have covered balconies or porches, providing outdoor living space. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and no porches, emphasizing the brickwork. The house is surrounded by small landscaped areas with greenery at the base of the front porch.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows with shutters. Features include white columns, decorative railings, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two-story porch with columns, decorative railings, and symmetrical windows with shutters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, upper and lower windows with shutters, and the side extension of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick facade with minimal windows and no porches or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing brickwork, windows with shutters, and the side of the porch and balcony.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, white columns, decorative railings, and a small overhang with a dormer window above.
